name: UAE — 137 missiles, 209 drones
detail: 3 killed, 58+ injured. Burj Al Arab fire, Jebel Ali Port fire, Dubai Airport drone hit.

name: Israel — Multiple barrages
detail: 9+ killed near Beit Shemesh (synagogue), 777 hospitalized. Tel Nof and HaKirya targeted.

name: Qatar — 65 missiles, 12 drones
detail: Al Udeid Air Base targeted. Qatar shot down 2 Su-24s, 7 missiles, 5 drones. 16 injured.

name: Kuwait — Camp Buehring drone strike
detail: 4 US service members killed, 5 seriously wounded. Ali Al Salem attacked.

name: Iraq/Erbil — 70+ missiles and drones
detail: Erbil Airport and US Consulate targeted. Fire at air base.

name: Bahrain — 5th Fleet HQ targeted
detail: Shahed drone struck apartment near HQ. Airport hit. 4 injured.

name: USS Abraham Lincoln — IRGC claims hit
detail: CENTCOM categorically denies: "Not hit. Not even close." Lincoln continues ops.

name: Lebanon — Hezbollah enters conflict
detail: 6 projectiles at Israeli base near Haifa. Israel strikes Beirut; 52 killed, 154 wounded in Lebanon.
